title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Full-Stack Developer focused on building scalable and maintainable web applications using React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Experienced in designing RESTful APIs, structuring backend systems, and delivering clean, production-ready code.

title: Background
description: Background in software and data engineering, with experience building backend systems, APIs, and data workflows using Java, Python, and SQL/NoSQL databases.

title: Current Focus
description: Focused on growing as a Full-Stack Developer by building real-world applications and improving system design and backend architecture skills. Open to Junior Full-Stack, Frontend, or Backend Developer opportunities.
